instructions.instruction: Use this skill when writing new Phoenix controller modules or modifying existing controller code to ensure consistent, idiomatic patterns.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when writing new Phoenix controller modules or modifying existing controller code to ensure consistent, idiomatic patterns.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Use `before_action` for authentication and resource loading** — chain with `:skip` opt-out pattern
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `before_action` for authentication and resource loading** — chain with `:skip` opt-out pattern
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Always validate and authorize** every action that touches access-controlled resources
instructions.original_snippets: **Always validate and authorize** every action that touches access-controlled resources
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Use `FallbackController` for JSON API error handling** — never inline `error/2` or catch-all `case` clauses in actions
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `FallbackController` for JSON API error handling** — never inline `error/2` or catch-all `case` clauses in actions
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Use `conn.assigns` for passing data between plugs and actions** — never use `Process` dictionaries
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `conn.assigns` for passing data between plugs and actions** — never use `Process` dictionaries
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Never interpolate user input into redirect paths** — use `~p"..."` paths for verified routes
instructions.original_snippets: **Never interpolate user input into redirect paths** — use `~p"..."` paths for verified routes
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.

instructions.instruction: **Checkpoint:** Run `mix phx.routes` to verify routes resolve correctly.
instructions.original_snippets: **Checkpoint:** Run `mix phx.routes` to verify routes resolve correctly.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger apply-phoenix-controller-conventions.
